allow: PowerShell($log = "$env:TEMP\\godot_check.log"; Write-Output "=== line count ==="; \(Get-Content $log | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "=== full content ==="; Get-Content $log)
Bash(rm -rf scripts/units scripts/effects scripts/ui scenes/units scenes/effects)
Bash(rm -f node_2d.tscn player.tscn scenes/main_menu.tscn scenes/commander.tscn scenes/objective.tscn)

Bash(rm -f scripts/game_manager.gd scripts/command_controller.gd scripts/commander.gd scripts/enemy_commander.gd scripts/terrain.gd scripts/objective.gd scripts/cinematic.gd scripts/sound_manager.gd scripts/main_menu.gd scripts/fog_overlay.gd)

Bash(rm -f scripts/game_manager.gd.uid scripts/command_controller.gd.uid scripts/commander.gd.uid scripts/enemy_commander.gd.uid scripts/terrain.gd.uid scripts/objective.gd.uid scripts/cinematic.gd.uid scripts/sound_manager.gd.uid scripts/main_menu.gd.uid scripts/fog_overlay.gd.uid)
